questionHtml: Outline what happens when spinach extract is spotted on a TLC plate and placed into a container of solvent.
markschemeHtml:
a. solvent will move up «the TLC plate/stationary phase»

b. pigments will move up «the TLC plate/stationary phase carried by solvent»

c. pigments will move at different rates/separate

[Max 2 Marks]

meta.title: Outline what happens when spinach extract is spotted on a TLC plate and placed into a container of solvent.
